description_long: This is a wooden storage box with a classic crate design, featuring vertical wooden planks on each side and reinforced with diagonal and horizontal wooden slats. The corners are secured with visible metal fasteners, giving it a sturdy and robust appearance. The wood grain is clearly visible, with a light, natural finish that suggests it is untreated or only lightly varnished. The top of the box is flat and constructed from similar wooden planks, making it suitable for stacking or supporting other objects. There are no visible handles, locks, or openings, indicating a simple, utilitarian construction. The overall look is reminiscent of shipping crates commonly found in warehouses, garages, or outdoor urban environments.
description: A sturdy, light-colored wooden crate with visible grain, reinforced corners, and a flat top, designed for storage or transport. The box has a classic, utilitarian appearance with no visible handles or locks.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wooden planks and diagonal reinforcement, with metal fasteners at the corners.
description_view_1: Side view is nearly identical to the front, displaying the same plank and diagonal slat pattern.
description_view_2: Another side view, mirroring the previous sides with consistent wood grain and reinforcement.
description_view_3: Back view matches the other sides, maintaining the same construction and detailing.
